name: Tostado Pie/Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. To make meat sauce: Heat olive oil in a large frying pan. Saute onion until golden.
2. Add ground beef, seasonings, and tomato sauce to the pan. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Alternatively, transfer the mixture to a crockpot and cook on low for 8 hours.
4. Mix in 1 cup of sliced pitted olives if desired.
5. Place a square of foil at the bottom of the crockpot.
6. Lightly butter one side of each tortilla.
7. Lay one tortilla, buttered side up, on the foil. Spread with a layer of meat sauce and cheese.
8. Cover with another tortilla, more meat sauce, and cheese. Repeat layers, ending with cheese.
9. Cover and cook in the crockpot on high for 1 hour.
10. When ready to serve, lift from the crockpot by the foil corners.
11. If desired, brown the cheese under a broiler.
12. Cut into wedges.
13. Combine sour cream and onions.
14. Serve with Tostada wedges.
